audience_policies.source_phrase: This coupon allows 50% off admission for up to 4 people. This pass is emailed to you - you will not need to come in to the library to pick it up. Please make sure you enter your current email address when making your reservation.

coupon.source_phrase_block: This coupon allows 50% off admission for up to 4 people. This pass is emailed to you - you will not need to come in to the library to pick it up. Please make sure you enter your current email address when making your reservation.
